pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property and compiler source/target settings from Java 8 to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets JDK 17; compiling with source/target 8 or running on JDK 17 with outdated compiler settings causes incompatibility or failure to utilize required language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot from version 2.4.2 to 3.1.4 to align with JDK 17 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support JDK 17 as a baseline; upgrading to 3.x is required for compilation and runtime compatibility with JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Camunda External Task Client from 1.4.1 to 7.20.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Camunda client versions may not be compatible with the new Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem or JDK 17, leading to runtime errors or dependency conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) for testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 is deprecated in modern Spring Boot 3.x environments; tests using JUnit 4 annotations will fail to compile or run without migrating to JUnit 5.
